items.title: Melania Trump urges ABC to 'take stand' on Jimmy Kimmel after widow joke
items.summary: In a parody aired days before the White House Correspondents' Dinner, Kimmel called Melania an "expectant widow".

items.title: Trump says King will be 'very safe' during US visit after security talks
items.summary: The state visit will go ahead despite concerns raised after a gunman targeted an event attended by the president.

items.title: Pakistan accused of attacking Afghan university
items.summary: Air attacks on the province of Kunar have killed at least seven people and injured 75, sources tell the BBC.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 伊朗提重啟荷姆茲  魯比歐解析其背後真意：對美國來說無法接受
items.summary: 美國新聞網站「Axios」27日報導揭露，伊朗透過巴基斯坦向美國提交新協商方案，同意重啟荷姆茲海峽、藉此結束戰爭，但也要求華府結束對德黑蘭的海上封鎖，被美國視為頭號目標的核協議則...…

items.title: 普廷會晤伊朗外長 稱將全力協助中東和平
items.summary: 原定於巴基斯坦舉行的第二輪美伊會談破裂後，美國與伊朗之間的和平努力陷入僵局，伊朗外交部長阿拉奇（Abbas Araghchi）更前往俄國與俄羅斯總統普廷會晤，並指責是美國導致談判...…

items.title: 最重無期徒刑！白宮記協晚宴槍手首出庭 被控暗殺川普未遂
items.summary: 美國總統川普及多名內閣要員25日出席白宮記者協會晚宴時驚傳槍響。涉嫌開槍的男子艾倫（Cole Tomas Allen）27日被控暗殺川普未遂，若罪名成立，他最重將面臨無期徒刑。 ...…
